a(R)end,function(J,l)local a=o(l)local N=function(N)return q(J,{N},l,a)end return N end,function(J,l)local a=o(l)local N=function(N,M)return q(J,{N,M},l,a)end return N end,function(J,l)local a=o(l)local N=function(N,M,Z)return q(J,{N;M;Z},l,a)end return N end,function(J,l)local a=o(l)local N=function(N,M,Z,z)return q(J,{N,M;Z;z},l,a)end return N end,{},-519227-(-519227)return(c(-119623+9959773,{}))(a(R))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[l(-989843-(-1023083))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
